structures.name: Program Header
structures.description: Program documentation including purpose, indexed random-read behavior, portability notes, and maintenance history.

structures.name: IDENTIFICATION DIVISION
structures.description: Declares the program name VSCBEX03 and identifies the compilation unit.

structures.name: FILE-CONTROL
structures.description: Defines the indexed customer file, its physical assignment, record key, RANDOM access mode, and file status handling.

structures.name: CUSTFile FD
structures.description: Defines the indexed customer file record layout using the shared CUSTOMER copybook.

structures.name: WORKING-STORAGE SECTION
structures.description: Declares file status fields, record counters, static key storage, key table structures, and end-of-job messages.

structures.name: Key Table Setup
structures.description: Initializes the in-memory key table by moving predefined key values into the OCCURS-based key array.

structures.name: 0000-Mainline
structures.description: Top-level control flow coordinating initialization, random-read processing, and program termination.

structures.name: 1000-Begin-Job
structures.description: Populates the key table, opens the indexed file for random access, and prepares the program for processing.

structures.name: 2000-Process
structures.condition: VARYING WS-Key-SUB FROM 1 UNTIL WS-Key-SUB > WS-Key-Element-Cnt
structures.description: Iterates over the predefined key table, assigns each key to the record key field, and performs a random indexed read.

structures.name: 5000-Read-CUSTFile
structures.description: Performs a random READ on the indexed file using the supplied record key, updates counters, and handles error conditions.

structures.name: 3000-End-Job
structures.description: Displays end-of-job statistics and closes the indexed file.

structures.name: Random Read Error Path
structures.description: Handles read failures by displaying diagnostics, performing cleanup, setting the return code, and terminating execution.
